title: IntentSpec
description: Structured interpretation of a user's photo+annotation+text request. All lengths in millimeters.

category.description: Wedge category guess; template_id null if freeform/long-tail.

description.description: One-sentence restatement of what the user wants, in plain English.

context_notes.description: Environment/function notes: load hints, outdoor/UV, moisture, heat.

template_fit.description: How well the chosen template_id can actually express the request (0=not at all, 1=perfect). Null when template_id is null. Be honest: shoehorning a bad fit is worse than admitting 'other'.

unsupported_features.description: Features the request needs that the matched template CANNOT express (e.g. 'hole grid/pattern', 'curved profile', 'embossed text', 'multiple bodies', 'hinge/joint'). Non-empty => the request should probably go freeform.

critical.description: If true, may only commit from user_measured.

questions.description: Measurement/clarification prompts, each renderable as an overlay on the user's photo.

dim_name.description: For measure_mm: the dimension name. For choice: the enum template-param name it sets (e.g. load_hint), or null for material_suggestion.

suggested_value.description: For a choice question: the value the vision provider recommends. Used as the enum param proposal (below an answered choice, above the template default).

chosen_value.description: Filled in when the user answers a choice question. Never set by the provider.

overlay.description: A dimension-line overlay drawn on the photo (normalized 0-1 coords). The label chip's value/state comes from the linked dimension, not from here.

kind.description: dim_line: a straight linear measurement between two points. dim_depth: a receding measurement going away from the camera (drawn dashed/foreshortened). dim_ellipse: a diameter of a round feature seen in perspective (a circle looks like an ellipse).

points.description: For dim_line / dim_depth: exactly two [x,y] endpoints — the two ends of the measured distance.

center.description: For dim_ellipse: the [x,y] center of the round feature.

rx.description: For dim_ellipse: horizontal radius, as a fraction of image WIDTH.

ry.description: For dim_ellipse: vertical radius, as a fraction of image WIDTH (a circle head-on has rx==ry; in perspective ry<rx).

rotation.description: For dim_ellipse: rotation of the ellipse in DEGREES.

shape.description: Legacy overlay shape (superseded by kind); still accepted for backward compatibility.
